title: Cakes, Pies & Muffins
description: Enrich the Blocky Cake with some spiceups to make it even more juicy!
body:
# **Cakes, Pies AND Muffins!**

**This Modpack aims to take the rush out of minecraft to take on the fight against the 2 week minecraft Phase. Take your time. With everything.**

With it's focus on semi realism and aesthetics you won't see any complex mods in CPM except **Create**, since this incredible mod still seems very intuitve whilst being complex enough to give the game a _fresh new flavor_



### A lot of mods - Just a few new things.

Many mods are meant or added in hopes of enhancing rather then changing the game. Ever been botherd by zick zack fences, walls, or panes? Now you can have them in a 45° angle. Alongside the decoration mod **"Handcrafted"** you can truly make beautiful, steampunk like towns that feel _lively and vibrant_.
